description_long: This is a large, double-bladed battle axe with a robust, dark metallic head featuring two wide, symmetrical cutting edges. The axe head is reinforced with multiple prominent bolts or rivets, giving it a rugged, reinforced appearance. The handle is thick and appears to be made of wood, wrapped with a lighter material, possibly leather or cloth, for improved grip and comfort. The base of the handle is capped with a matching dark metal pommel, adding balance and durability. The overall design is heavy-duty, suggesting it is intended for powerful, two-handed use. The axe has a menacing, medieval aesthetic, suitable for display or use in themed urban environments such as movie sets, themed parks, or as a prop in urban fantasy scenarios.
description: A large, double-bladed battle axe with a dark, reinforced metal head and a thick, wrapped wooden handle. The design is rugged and medieval, with prominent bolts and a sturdy grip.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full width of the double blades, central bolts, and the wrapped handle.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the narrow profile of the axe head and the thickness of the handle.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, displaying the symmetrical blades and central reinforcement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and the pointed top of the axe head.
attribute_handle_type: Thick, cylindrical wooden handle with a slight taper, wrapped in leather or cloth for grip, straight with a robust, ergonomic design.
attribute_blade_design: Double-edged, wide symmetrical blades with a curved cutting edge, reinforced with multiple bolts, no beard, and a heavy central poll.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged and bolted mounting with visible reinforcement bolts.
